name: Backer Wall Ticker
description: Social-proof ticker and supporter wall for campaign backers, waitlist joins, referrals, quotes, cities, or recent pledge activity.

ticker-wall.description: Horizontal ticker rows mixed with supporter wall segments for recent pledge activity and testimonials.

slots.ticker-row: Scrolling or static row of recent backer events.
slots.supporter-grid: Dense supporter names, avatars, locations, or quotes.
slots.proof-summary: Short trust summary tying backer activity to campaign momentum.

static-wall.description: Reduced-motion friendly static supporter wall with grouped names, quotes, and pledge badges.

slots.supporter-tile: Small supporter entry with name, pledge, location, or quote.

visual_brief: A lively but legible social-proof surface. The ticker should feel like an arcade scoreboard or receipt roll of new supporters, not a noisy ad marquee. Respect reduced motion by switching to a static wall. Supporter content should build trust through real names, roles, cities, quotes, or pledge levels.

responsive.mobile: Use a static or very slow single-row ticker plus compact supporter list. Avoid tiny unreadable marquee text.
responsive.tablet: Two ticker rows or static grouped wall.
responsive.desktop: Ticker rows can span full width with supporter wall or proof summary below.

layout_hints.motion_safety: Auto-scrolling must pause on hover/focus and disable under reduced motion.
layout_hints.proof_quality: Prefer fewer meaningful supporter signals over endless anonymous names.
layout_hints.privacy: Support anonymous backer states and avoid exposing sensitive pledge amounts unless explicitly public.

ambient.ticker: slow horizontal scroll with pause on hover and reduced-motion static fallback
ambient.new-backer: brief highlight pulse when a new supporter appears

keyboard: Ticker pause control must be keyboard reachable when auto-scroll is active.
Animated updates should not steal focus.
accessibility.focus_management: Do not continuously announce ticker movement. Announce only meaningful new events.
